title: BetterCombat x CobblemonArmory
description: Add animations from BetterCombat to CobblemonArmory
body:
# ⚔️ BetterCombat x CobblemonArmory

### Integration between **Better Combat** and **Cobblemon Armory**

This datapack adds **dynamic combat animations** from the [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) mod to the exclusive weapons of [Cobblemon Armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemonarmory), bringing a much more fluid and stylish battle experience to the Pokémon world!

---

## 🧩 Functionality

Each weapon from **Cobblemon Armory** automatically receives a matching **Better Combat** animation:

| Weapon                  | Pokémon    | Animation Type |
| ----------------------- | ---------- | -------------- |
| 🗡️ **Ceruledge Sword** | Ceruledge  | `sword`        |
| 🥊 **Primeape Gloves**  | Primeape   | `fist`         |
| ⚔️ **Sirfetch’d Sword** | Sirfetch’d | `sword_knife`  |
| 💫 **Starmie Sword**    | Starmie    | `cutlass`      |
| 🔨 **Tinkaton Hammer**  | Tinkaton   | `hammer`       |

---

## 🛠️ Requirements

* **Minecraft:** 1.21.1
* **Required Mods:**

  * [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
  * [Cobblemon Armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` datapack.
2. Place it in the folder: `.minecraft/saves/<YOUR_WORLD>/datapacks/`
3. Reload your world or use the command: `/reload`

---
